title: Swirl Pan Shake & Fresh Lemon & Blossom Mist Aroma Carpet Freshener Foam Spray 500ml Essential Oil Odour Neutraliser for Carpets, Rugs & Upholstery, Quick-Dry, Long-Lasting Freshness Pack of 12
features: POWERFUL ODOUR NEUTRALISER: Infused with essential oils to effectively banish everyday smells from carpets, rugs, and upholstery, leaving a fresh Lemon & Blossom Mist fragrance
QUICK-DRYING FOAM FORMULA: Specially designed foam spray penetrates fibres to neutralise odours without soaking, allowing for fast drying and immediate use of treated areas
REVIVES AND REFRESHES: Restores the look and feel of carpets and rugs whilst eliminating trapped odours, providing long-lasting freshness throughout your home
SHAKE & FRESH APPLICATION: Simply shake the can well before use and spray evenly across the surface for optimal odour elimination and fragrance distribution
GENEROUS 500ML SIZE: Convenient 500ml spray can provides ample product for multiple applications across various rooms and textile surfaces in your home
description: Product description Pan Aroma Swirl Shake & Fresh Carpet Freshener Foam Spray brings professional-quality freshness to your home with its innovative quick-drying formula. This 500ml spray can delivers a delightful Lemon & Blossom Mist scent that transforms tired carpets, rugs, and upholstery into refreshed, inviting spaces. Infused with essential oils, this carpet freshener works to neutralise everyday odours rather than simply masking them, tackling pet smells, cooking aromas, and general household mustiness with ease. The unique foam spray application revives the look and feel of your soft furnishings without saturating the fibres, meaning your carpets dry quickly and are ready to walk on in no time. Simply shake the can, spray evenly across the surface, and let the formula work its magic. The long-lasting freshness ensures your rooms smell wonderful for days, whilst the gentle formulation is suitable for use on various textile surfaces throughout your home. Perfect for regular maintenance or pre-guest preparation, this carpet freshener offers an effortless way to maintain a clean, welcoming environment in any room. Ingredients Natural
